step2.customerArchetype: Independent service providers who built a following on Etsy or Instagram and now want a brand kit they can apply to product drops and a real site
step2.painPoints: Existing visual identity was assembled drop-by-drop; nothing reads as one studio across product, social, and shop
step2.desiredOutcomes: A single brand that holds across the marketplace listing, social channel, and the next platform they expand to

step4.missionStatement: Help independent creators ship a brand that works across every platform they sell on.

step5.originSummary: Started doing print collateral for friends' Etsy shops; turned it into the full brand kit they actually needed.
step5.motivation: Wanted independent creators to stop reinventing their visual identity every six months.

step7.differentiation: Built for creators who already sell on platform; the kit ships in formats that fit each channel out of the box.
